_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex.

_contextSnippet: The mean total cNF-Skindex score was 40.7 (Table 2). Nine participants had a total cNF-Skindex score that placed them in severity stratum 1 (nonbothersome cNF, 15%), 28 were in stratum 2 (moderately bothersome cNF, 48%) and 22 patients were in stratum 3 (very bothersome cNF, 37%).
details: Mean total cNF-Skindex score was 40.7 (SD 27.1) with median 36.0 (IQR 15.0-65.0) and score range 3-94
